/CAL:VJC PROGRESS REPORT/CONTD: PROC RE $1,000 BW STAY FROM 05-25-22/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCHWARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO06-01-22/X: BAIL SET AT $ 1,000/DOPC/

/CAL:VJC PROGRESS REPORT/DEF:PRESENT VIA ZOOM/EMMOD:CURFEW,REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS:1PMTO 9AM/X:ALL OTHER CONDITIONS OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING REMAIN THE SAME/CONTD: VJC PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:ISSUE TRANSPORTATION ORDER/X:TRANSPORTATION ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/DEF:SHOULD BE TRANSPORTED TO SAFE HEAVEN FOR HOUSING,PROGRAMMING AND TREATMENT PLAN/DEF:MUST COMPLY WITH CURFEW, REMAIN CONFINED WITHING THE INTERIOR PREMISESOF RESIDENCE,SAFE HEAVEN, DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS NOON TO 9AM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:STATUS OF PLACEMENT/DOP/
/CAL: STATUS OF PLACEMENT/X: DEFENDANT LEFT THE TREATMENT CENTER IN MARINCOUNTY/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:1,000/BWNUM:1,000/X: 2 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/

/CAL: STATUS OF M99/DAWT/X: DOCKET 22001729 REQUIRES A WAIVER OR COURT ORDER FROM THE ORIGNATING COURT TO JOIN VJC/X: THIS MATTER WILL BE SENT TO M12 TO JOIN 22001729/CONTD: DECISION ON WAIVER TO PARTICIPATE IN VJC/
